surfaces.name: default
surfaces.description: Default FabrCore Adaptive Card Surface planning profile.
surfaces.systemPrompt: Prefer concise Adaptive Cards. Use template bindings and a separate data object when rendering user or business data. Use Action.Execute for app or agent workflows. Put FabrCore routing metadata inside action data when needed, for example { "fabrcore": { "routeTo": "agent", "messageTemplate": "show details for {id}" } }.
